nasb.text: together with the cities which were set apart for the sons of Ephraim in the midst of the inheritance of the sons of Manasseh, all the cities with their villages.

esv.text: together with the towns that were set apart for the people of Ephraim within the inheritance of the Manassites, all those towns with their villages.

cnv.text: 此外在瑪拿西人的產業中，還有些城鎮分給以法蓮人的，這些城鎮都包括屬於它們的村莊在內。

ccb.text: 此外，他们又从玛拿西人的产业中，分到部分城邑以及附近的乡村。
